
---

name: "Feature request"
about: Suggest an improvement or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
-------------

## Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the feature.

---

## Motivation

Explain why this feature is useful:

* Does it improve workflow?
* Does it enhance usability or aesthetics?
* Does it solve an existing limitation?

---

## Proposed Solution (Optional)

Describe how this could be implemented, if you have an idea.

---

## References (Optional)

Include links, screenshots, or examples from other setups if relevant.
